Notes.Text:
This update for libX11 fixes the following issues:

- CVE-2025-26597: improper resizing of key actions when nGroups is 0 can lead to buffer overflows in
  XkbChangeTypesOfKey() (bsc#1237431).

Vulnerabilities.Description: A buffer overflow flaw was found in X.Org and Xwayland. If XkbChangeTypesOfKey() is called with a 0 group, it will resize the key symbols table to 0 but leave the key actions unchanged. If the same function is later called with a non-zero value of groups, this will cause a buffer overflow because the key actions are of the wrong size.
